x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: MID Servers execute TSOM AI Agent-triggered discovery probes and remediation actions. Without healthy MID Servers AI actions fail silently.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("ecc_agent");gr.addQuery("status","Up");gr.query();var up=gr.getRowCount();var gr2=new GlideRecord("ecc_agent");gr2.query();var total=gr2.getRowCount();return{status:up>=1?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:total+" MID Servers | "+up+" Up",finding:up<1?"No MID Servers Up. Now Assist TSOM AI Agent-triggered probes and remediation actions require available MID Servers.":up+" MID Servers Up -- Now Assist TSOM AI Agent actions can execute."};})()
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Ensure MID Servers are Up and validated for each network zone. Upgrade to current instance version.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_0e03a33acfd903108935fb251d851cb6
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <ai_justification><![CDATA[MID Servers execute TSOM AI Agent-triggered discovery probes and remediation actions. Without healthy MID Servers AI actions fail silently.]]></ai_justification> <check_name>MID Server Health for TSOM</check_name> <check_script><![CDATA[(function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("ecc_agent");gr.addQuery("status","Up");gr.query();var up=gr.getRowCount();var gr2=new GlideRecord("ecc_agent");gr2.query();var total=gr2.getRowCount();return{status:up>=1?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:total+" MID Servers | "+up+" Up",finding:up<1?"No MID Servers Up. Now Assist TSOM AI Agent-triggered probes and remediation actions require available MID Servers.":up+" MID Servers Up -- Now Assist TSOM AI Agent actions can execute."};})()]]></check_script> <is_active>true</is_active> <is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive> <is_manual>false</is_manual> <module>AIOPS</module> <number>CHK0006076</number> <order>90</order> <remediation_guidance>Ensure MID Servers are Up and validated for each network zone. Upgrade to current instance version.</remediation_guidance> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on> <sys_id>0e03a33acfd903108935fb251d851cb6</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on> </x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
